_p0_9_note: P0-9 / ultracode-audit-2026-06-06: zipSha256 is stamped at release time. WebUI update-check (webui/update-check.js) refuses to download if the field is empty/missing (toast: update_unsigned_warning). Hash is the SHA256 of the v0.4.1-rc2 zip asset on GitHub releases. If you re-upload the zip you MUST re-stamp and re-push this file.
